violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC called for service at time of inspection. Establishment to sanitize in three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
Empanadas (12/9) were observed with a date mark exceeding 7 days. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

Eggplant was not washed before being cut. Raw fruits and vegetables must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are cut. Employee was informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
Single-use items (alcohol bottles) are being reused for dressing storage. Single-use items shall not be reused. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2024

The floor and wall junctures along one wall near the walk in cooler do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024
The hand-washing sink in the upstairs bar was lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
Fruit bin observed in the hand-washing sink in the upstairs bar. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as butter) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized, and bagged ice will be used until it is. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, floor mixer, knives in the knife rack) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. All items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
Bolognese sauce observed marked with a date exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Chemical spray bottle was stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items at the upstairs bar. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
Digital food thermometer was nonfunctional during inspection. The stem thermometer was lacking the tool to calibrate. New food thermometer(s) needed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the prep unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2024

Working containers of ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
Ice bucket not stored inverted. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Cleaned utensils observed stored on an unclean electrical box, in a gap between a wall and electrical conduit, and jammed along the wall behind a utensil storage rack. Cleaned equipment and utensils shall be stored in a clean dry location where they are not subject to dust, splash, or other contamination, and at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
Numerous single-use items are being reused for food preparation and storage. Single-use items shall not be reused. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in several areas of the kitchen, and in the basement storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the basement storage area.Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the basement storage area.Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
The robot coupe bowl was not in good repair, cracked. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Aluminum wrap and cardboard observed lining shelves in the kitchen and walk in cooler. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:prep unitsice machinefloor mixerknife rackrobot coupe basefan in dishroombeer coolers at main bar, especially around lidsThe freezer in the salad/dessert area has an accumulation of ice.Paper residue and adhesive observed on numerous food containers in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The floor and wall junctures along one wall near the walk in cooler do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2025

The support beam between prep tables has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The insulation covering a ceiling duct in the cleaning closet is in poor repair, with a section of spun insulation exposed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the salad/dessert area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
